zh.title: 金·克莱门特预言全集 - 南非裔美国基督教先知的14条预言与验证 | Kim Clement Prophecies
zh.description: 金·克莱门特（Kim Clement，1956-2016）是南非裔美国灵恩派先知与音乐人。以电视节目《预言警报》闻名，预言涵盖特朗普总统任期、科学突破、中东局势、经济走向等领域。
zh.keywords: 金克莱门特,Kim Clement,基督教预言,先知,特朗普预言,预言警报,灵恩派,预言验证
zh.ogTitle: 金·克莱门特预言全集 | Kim Clement Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 南非裔美国基督教先知金·克莱门特的预言完整收录与验证分析。涵盖政治、科技、经济、中东局势等领域。
zh.twitterDescription: 14条金·克莱门特预言完整收录与验证。已应验：特朗普当选总统、两任总统预言等。

en.title: Kim Clement Prophecies - 14 Predictions from the Singing Prophet (1956-2016) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: South African-American Christian prophet Kim Clement (1956-2016) made numerous prophecies on his TV show 'Prophetic Alert'. Known for predicting Trump's presidency, scientific breakthroughs, and Middle East events. Full archive with verification.
en.keywords: Kim Clement,Kim Clement prophecy,singing prophet,prophetic alert,Trump prophecy,Christian prophet,charismatic prophecy,prophecy verification
en.ogTitle: Kim Clement Prophecies - The Singing Prophet's Complete Predictions
en.ogDescription: 14 prophecies from Kim Clement (1956-2016), the singing prophet. Full archive with real-world verification covering politics, technology, economy, and Middle East.
en.twitterDescription: 14 predictions from Kim Clement, the singing prophet. Verified: Trump presidency, two presidents prophecy, and more.
